description: A dark, dramatic designed announcement graphic. The background is a near-black textured surface with faint stenciled numerals and crosshair / military-tracking style markings (small '10' reticle ticks and a faint vertical reticle line), evoking declassified surveillance or gun-camera footage. Centered at top is the official White House mark: a small white line engraving of the White House building above the words 'THE WHITE HOUSE' and 'WASHINGTON' in white serif type. Below in a clean white monospace/typewriter typeface is the headline: 'Department of War Releases Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena Files in Historic Transparency Effort'. Beneath that is a bold red rectangular button/banner with white text 'WAR.GOV/UFO'. The style mimics a classified-document reveal. The messaging technique is to present the administration as uniquely transparent ('Historic Transparency Effort'), tying the renamed 'Department of War' to a populist, attention-grabbing UAP/UFO disclosure. Target audience: the broad public and online communities interested in UFO disclosure, positioning the administration as bold and forthcoming.
notable_text: Department of War Releases Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena Files in Historic Transparency Effort / WAR.GOV/UFO
